java-app/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the build stage base image from Maven with OpenJDK 8 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin 21.
java-app/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code is migrated to Java 21; building with JDK 8 will fail to compile Java 21 source features or dependencies.

java-app/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the runtime stage base image from OpenJDK 8 JRE Alpine to Eclipse Temurin 21 JRE Alpine.
java-app/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application jar is compiled for Java 21; running it on a JDK 8 runtime will result in a NoSuchMethodError or UnsupportedClassVersionError.

java-app/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the OpenTelemetry Java agent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
java-app/Dockerfile.why_exists: Older versions of the OpenTelemetry agent may not support Java 21 bytecode or instrumentation hooks, leading to runtime failures.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.5 to 3.5.7 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces (jakarta.* instead of javax.*); using Spring Boot 2.x on Java 21 with Jakarta dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing symbol errors.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+; compiling with Java 8 settings against Spring Boot 3.x libraries results in compilation errors due to missing base classes and language feature incompatibilities.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-compiler-plugin configuration to explicitly set release to 21.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler targets Java 21 bytecode and API, preventing runtime NoSuchMethodError or UnsupportedClassVersionError on the target JDK.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.validation dependency with Spring Boot starter validation (Jakarta).
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.validation API was removed in Java 11 and replaced by Jakarta EE; Spring Boot 3.x uses jakarta.validation, so the old javax dependency causes compile-time symbol not found errors.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove javax.ws.rs-api dependency as it is no longer compatible with Jakarta EE.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.ws.rs is part of the old Java EE namespace; Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 environments expect Jakarta EE (jakarta.ws.rs) or specific implementations, leading to classpath conflicts or missing symbols if mixed.
